results.rendered_html:
yojaka (von 1. yuj) nom. ag.
1〉 Anschirrer, Anspanner: vāji˚  MBH. 4,320 . ratha˚ 9,819 .  BHĀG. P. 12,11,48 .
— 2〉 Veranstalter, Ausführer: yuddha˚ so v. a. kampflustig  MBH. 5,2114 . = yuddhodyogin  NĪLAK.

results.rendered_html:
yojaka a. [yuj-ṇvul]
1 One who yokes or harnesses.
2 Joining, uniting, providing &c.
3 A joiner, arranger, contriver; yojakastatra durlabhaḥ.
